TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Si-mung_Pow-li-wa, title = Si-mung_Pow-li-wa, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Si-mung_Pow-li-wa} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == :Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios,1783ŚĻī7śúą24śó•‚ÄĒ1830ŚĻī12śúą17śó•), . Si-mung.hu.An-tung-ni-aw.Te-la-san-ti-ai-ma.Ta-li-ni-ta.pow-li-wa-Pa-la-si-aw-s (Si-panng-ya a kamu:Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios, 1783 a mihca 7 a bulad 24 a demiad - 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad) u ngangan Si-mung.Pow-li-wa, La-tin-mey-cow tesek milaangay, tesekay mikawaway nu hitay, tesekay nu cen-ce, tesekay nu mizatengay, ciziza aci Sen-ma-tin masasuawaw tu, u Nan-mey-cow amiliyas tu pikuwan nu Si-pang-ya, angangan milunguc amisateked palekal. nilaculan i makay atu Si-pang-ya sakakaay mikeliday nu kanatal pilalebuay makademec hawsa, Pow-li-wa aci Sen-ma-tin mapulung miedap tu Nan-mey-cow a kasateked nu kanatal, patizeng tu La-tin-mey-cow u saayaway nu mitekeday a kakadum nu kanatal, u Taa-ke-lon-pi-ya, 1819 a mihcaan katukuh 1830 a muhcaan mala Cung-tung nuyniay a kanatal. nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Si-mung.pow-li-wa lecuhiI Wi-ney-luy-la-cya-la-cya-s cacay u kakitaan a luma'. lecuh i ayzaay a Wi-ney-luy-la angangan nu cya-la-cya-s, ngasaw a ngangnan Pow-li-wa u makayzaay I Si-pang-ya Pa-s-ke a kakitizaan tu Si-aw-al-te-sa-OW-li-wa-al. I lima' niza, caay ku ahebal ku pipalumaan atu 1000 a katuud ku kuli dada', izaw hena ku kim a aalaan, waneng kusi, luma' zaysang atu pacakayan tu zyunga. zuma midebungay mahiza u sikulisiway, u labu nu luma' niza u mipenecay, u mamipenecay aca. u sasikezay nuheni a mialaw tu mikuliay a sakauzip. zumaay tu, u heni i cen-cean, kizayanan masakinih nu midebungay a Si-pang-ya, mipenec, siza, uyni sikalisiway sakalah amaydih pabelin tu mikuwanay nu midemungay, mihulak tu sacukcuk nu midebungay. ci Pow-li-wa cay katenes a lecuhan, caay kakapah ku uzip niza a wama ina ahicanaca papidiput han niza ku nu luma'ay akuli, tusa a mihcaan hawsa ci Pow-li-wa tayza tu i luma'a ni wama ina niza, uyzasa zikuz u ngelu' niza malalid malalid ku pihaceng. 1786 a mihca 1 a bulad, ci Pow-li-wa tusa izaw ku pangkiw a mihcaan hawsa, u wama ci Bo-an.Wi-sen-te.Pow-li-wa zayhan mahaykaku mapatay, 8 a mihcaan ku nikauzip hawsa "1792 a mihcaan" wina ci Tang-na.Ma-li-ya.Te-la-kungsay-pow-si-ong.Pa-la-si-aw-s.i .Pu-lan-ke mapatay, mapatay tu amin ku wama ina zikuz, ci Ka-low-s amasingan a luma' mueneng ciniza, nama hiza i 1799 a mihcaan tayza i Si-pang-ya minanam tu Ba a cudad, 1802 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad maladay ci Ma-li-ya.Ta-lye-ya.Low-te-li-kuy-ce.Te-al-tu-low.A-lay-sa i Si-pang-ya-Ma-te-li malaacawa, 7 a bulad 12 a demiad maladay tu acawa taluma' i niyazu' Wi-ney-luy-la, nika acawa ci Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa i 1803 a mihca 1 a bulad 22 a demiad malalid nu imelang mapatay.1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow ciniza, 12 a bulad 2 a demiad tayza i Pa-li milihiza tu pakawlah ni Na-pow-lun, mala mikiliday nu mikuwanay ni Na-pow-lun. mapatayś≠Ľšļ° , Si-mung.pow-li-wa i 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad zayhan mahaykaku mapatay i Ke-lun-piya "ayzaay a Ke-lun-piya" a Sen-ma-al-ta.1842 a mihca 12 a bulad 23 a demiad, Pow-li-wa a ukak matadem i ngasawan a tadem. ci Pow-li-wa i ayaw a mapatay misalunguc ciniza tu sakatusa nu mikuwanay ci Tan-ni-al.Bow-low-lun-s.Aw-li tuduhen ku zikuc niza, pasu nisulitan, tigami atu sapapelu a nisulitan. teked a nikaauzipÁßĀšļļÁĒüśīĽ 1799 a mihcaan 16 ku mihcaan cni Pow-li-wa miladay tu kapah hena mapatay tu a wama ci Hu-an.Wi-sen-te "1786 a mihcaan mapatay" atu wina ci Kang-say.pu-si-ong "1792 a mihcaan", miliwku miccudad I Mo-si-ke, Ba-kow atu Si-pang-ya. 1802 a mihcaan, i Ma-te-li- tu makayniay i Cya-la-cya-s-Ma-al-ke-s.te-al.to-low luma'ay a Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa.Li-te-li-ke-s.Te-al.to-low.A-lay-ca malaacawaw, 8 a bulad zikuz mikilid tu luma'ay taluma' i Wi-ney-loy-la, caay ka lemed malalid tu akuti'ay a imelang mapatay. Pow-li-ya i 1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow, i Na-pow-lun a hungtian a kanatal miliwku. i Ba-kow a demiadani Pa-li maazih niza ci Ya-li-san-ta. Bung.Hung-paw. Hung-paw na i1804 a mihcaan misulit tu, "na i Pali maazih ku cacay masakapahay a tatamia, masasukamu cinizaan hawsa mihaymaw sakay cinizaan tu paydang maydih manawang, nika nayinayi' ku kasibalucu'. laluma'an Ť¶™ŚĪ¨ . ci Pow-li-wa nayi' ku wawa, u wawanay mabenit atu sibuluuk, u laluma'an niza uyza kakana sabama dada' izaw ku cacay a sabana mapatay. Kakana ci Hu-an-na.Pow-li-wa.Pow-la-si-aw-s mikadabu tu sinaama ci Ti-aw-ni-si-aw.pa-la-si-aw-s.Pu-lan-ke, asaca tatusa ku nipahabay tu wawaci Ci-li-al-mu atu ci Pan-ni-ci-na. Ci-li-al-mu i 1817 a mihca 12 a bulad 2 demiad mapulung tu sinaama milais mapatay, Pan-ni-ci-na natusaay tu siacawa, Pow-li-wa a sangaayay a laluma'an, tatusaay a baki nuheni ci Pey-te-low-atciAy-te-hwa-tu, zikuz katukuh 2009 a mihcaan mauzip i Cyw-la-Cya-s.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == :sim*n *os* antonio d…ô r~…ĺa sant*sima trinidad bor~…ĺ**ar j par~…ĺa ¶ios,**********************), . si-muŇč.ńßu.an-tuŇč-ni-aw.t…ô-r~…ĺa-san-ti-ai-ma.ta-r~…ĺi-ni-ta.pow-r~…ĺi-wa-pa-r~…ĺa-si-aw-s (si-panŇč-ja a kamu:sim*n *os* antonio d…ô r~…ĺa sant*sima trinidad bor~…ĺ**ar j par~…ĺa ¶ios, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad - **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad) u ŇčaŇčan si-muŇč.pow-r~…ĺi-wa, r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow t…ôs…ôk mir~…ĺaaŇčaj, t…ôs…ôkaj mikawawaj nu ńßitaj, t…ôs…ôkaj nu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, t…ôs…ôkaj nu mizat…ôŇčaj, ¶iziza a ¶i s…ôn-ma-tin masasuawaw tu, u nan-m…ô- ¶ow amir~…ĺijas tu pikuwan nu si-paŇč-ja, aŇčaŇčan mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ amisat…ôk…ôd par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan i makaj atu si-paŇč-ja sakakaaj mik…ôr~…ĺidaj nu kanatar~…ĺ pir~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbuaj makad…ôm…ô ¶ ńßawsa, pow-r~…ĺi-wa a ¶i s…ôn-ma-tin mapur~…ĺuŇč mi…ôdap tu nan-m…ô- ¶ow a kasat…ôk…ôd nu kanatar~…ĺ, patiz…ôŇč tu r~…ĺa-tin-m…ô- ¶ow u saajawaj nu mit…ôk…ôdaj a kakadum nu kanatar~…ĺ, u taa-k…ô-r~…ĺon-pi-ja, **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a muńß ¶aan mar~…ĺa ¶uŇč-tuŇč nujniaj a kanatar~…ĺ. nikauzipan** si-muŇč.pow-r~…ĺi-wa r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßii wi-n…ô-r~…ĺuj-r~…ĺa- ¶ja-r~…ĺa- ¶ja-s ¶a ¶aj u kakitaan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i ajzaaj a wi-n…ô-r~…ĺuj-r~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu ¶ja-r~…ĺa- ¶ja-s, Ňčasaw a ŇčaŇčnan pow-r~…ĺi-wa u makajzaaj i si-paŇč-ja pa-s-k…ô a kakitizaan tu si-aw-ar~…ĺ-t…ô-sa-ow-r~…ĺi-wa-ar~…ĺ. i r~…ĺima Ē~ ° niza, ¶aaj ku ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku pipar~…ĺumaan atu **** a katuud ku kur~…ĺi dada Ē~ °, izaw ńß…ôna ku kim a aar~…ĺaan, wan…ôŇč kusi, r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° zajsaŇč atu pa ¶akajan tu zjuŇča. zuma mid…ôbuŇčaj mańßiza u sikur~…ĺisiwaj, u r~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° niza u mip…ôn…ô ¶aj, u mamip…ôn…ô ¶aj a ¶a. u sasik…ôzaj nuńß…ôni a miar~…ĺaw tu mikur~…ĺiaj a sakauzip. zumaaj tu, u ńß…ôni i ¶…ôn- ¶…ôan, kizajanan masakinińß nu mid…ôbuŇčaj a si-paŇč-ja, mip…ôn…ô ¶, siza, ujni sikar~…ĺisiwaj sakar~…ĺańß amajdińß pab…ôr~…ĺin tu mikuwanaj nu mid…ômuŇčaj, mińßur~…ĺak tu sa ¶uk ¶uk nu mid…ôbuŇčaj. ¶i pow-r~…ĺi-wa ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs a r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan, ¶aaj kakapańß ku uzip niza a wama ina ańßi ¶ana ¶a papidiput ńßan niza ku nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj akur~…ĺi, tusa a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa ¶i pow-r~…ĺi-wa tajza tu i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °a ni wama ina niza, ujzasa zikuz u Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° niza mar~…ĺar~…ĺid mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku pińßa ¶…ôŇč. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ¶i pow-r~…ĺi-wa tusa izaw ku paŇčkiw a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, u wama ¶i bo-an.wi-s…ôn-t…ô.pow-r~…ĺi-wa zajńßan mańßajkaku mapataj, * a mińß ¶aan ku nikauzip ńßawsa "**** a mińß ¶aan" wina ¶i taŇč-na.ma-r~…ĺi-ja.t…ô-r~…ĺa-kuŇčsaj-pow-si-oŇč.pa-r~…ĺa-si-aw-s.i .pu-r~…ĺan-k…ô mapataj, mapataj tu amin ku wama ina zikuz, ¶i ka-r~…ĺow-s amasiŇčan a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mu…ôn…ôŇč ¶iniza, nama ńßiza i **** a mińß ¶aan tajza i si-paŇč-ja minanam tu ba a ¶udad, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺadaj ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja.ta-r~…ĺj…ô-ja.r~…ĺow-t…ô-r~…ĺi-kuj- ¶…ô.t…ô-ar~…ĺ-tu-r~…ĺow.a-r~…ĺaj-sa i si-paŇč-ja-ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺaa ¶awa, * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺadaj tu a ¶awa tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i nijazu Ē~ ° wi-n…ô-r~…ĺuj-r~…ĺa, nika a ¶awa ¶i ma-r~…ĺi-ja.t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-sa i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mapataj.**** a mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i aw- ¶ow ¶iniza, ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad tajza i pa-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺińßiza tu pakawr~…ĺańß ni na-pow-r~…ĺun, mar~…ĺa mikir~…ĺidaj nu mikuwanaj ni na-pow-r~…ĺun. mapataj** , si-muŇč.pow-r~…ĺi-wa i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad zajńßan mańßajkaku misar~…ĺuŇču ¶ ¶iniza tu sakatusa nu mikuwanaj ¶i tan-ni-ar~…ĺ.bow-r~…ĺow-r~…ĺun-s.aw-r~…ĺi tuduńß…ôn ku ziku ¶ niza, pasu nisur~…ĺitan, tigami atu sapap…ôr~…ĺu a nisur~…ĺitan. t…ôk…ôd a nikaauzip**** **** a mińß ¶aan ** ku mińß ¶aan ¶ni pow-r~…ĺi-wa mir~…ĺadaj tu kapańß ńß…ôna mapataj tu a wama ¶i ńßu-an.wi-s…ôn-t…ô "**** a mińß ¶aan mapataj" atu wina ¶i kaŇč-saj.pu-si-oŇč "**** a mińß ¶aan", mir~…ĺiwku mi ¶ ¶udad i mo-si-k…ô, ba-kow atu si-paŇč-ja. **** a mińß ¶aan, i ma-t…ô-r~…ĺi- tu makajniaj i ¶ja-r~…ĺa- ¶ja-s-ma-ar~…ĺ-k…ô-s.t…ô-ar~…ĺ.to-r~…ĺow r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj a ma-r~…ĺi-ja.t…ô-r~…ĺj…ô-sa.r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s.t…ô-ar~…ĺ.to-r~…ĺow.a-r~…ĺaj- ¶a mar~…ĺaa ¶awaw, * a bur~…ĺad zikuz mikir~…ĺid tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i wi-n…ô-r~…ĺoj-r~…ĺa, ¶aaj ka r~…ĺ…ôm…ôd mar~…ĺar~…ĺid tu akuti Ē~ °aj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč mapataj. pow-r~…ĺi-ja i **** a mińß ¶aan tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i aw- ¶ow, i na-pow-r~…ĺun a ńßuŇčtian a kanatar~…ĺ mir~…ĺiwku. i ba-kow a d…ômiadani pa-r~…ĺi maazińß niza ¶i ja-r~…ĺi-san-ta. buŇč.ńßuŇč-paw. ńßuŇč-paw na i**** a mińß ¶aan misur~…ĺit tu, "na i par~…ĺi maazińß ku ¶a ¶aj masakapańßaj a tatamia, masasukamu ¶inizaan ńßawsa mińßajmaw sakaj ¶inizaan tu pajdaŇč majdińß manawaŇč, nika najinaji Ē~ ° ku kasibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ** . ¶i pow-r~…ĺi-wa naji Ē~ ° ku wawa, u wawanaj mab…ônit atu sibur~…ĺuuk, u r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an niza ujza kakana sabama dada Ē~ ° izaw ku ¶a ¶aj a sabana mapataj. kakana ¶i ńßu-an-na.pow-r~…ĺi-wa.pow-r~…ĺa-si-aw-s mikadabu tu sinaama ¶i ti-aw-ni-si-aw.pa-r~…ĺa-si-aw-s.pu-r~…ĺan-k…ô, asa ¶a tatusa ku nipańßabaj tu wawa ¶i ¶i-r~…ĺi-ar~…ĺ-mu atu ¶i pan-ni- ¶i-na. ¶i-r~…ĺi-ar~…ĺ-mu i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * d…ômiad mapur~…ĺuŇč tu sinaama mir~…ĺais mapataj, pan-ni- ¶i-na natusaaj tu sia ¶awa, pow-r~…ĺi-wa a saŇčaajaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, tatusaaj a baki nuńß…ôni ¶i p…ô-t…ô-r~…ĺow-at ¶iaj-t…ô-ńßwa-tu, zikuz katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan mauzip i ¶jw-r~…ĺa- ¶ja-s.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == :Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios,1783ŚĻī7śúą24śó•‚ÄĒ1830ŚĻī12śúą17śó•), . Si-mung.hu.An-tung-ni-aw.Te-la-san-ti-ai-ma.Ta-li-ni-ta.pow-li-wa-Pa-la-si-aw-s (Si-panng-ya a kamu:Sim√≥n Jos√© Antonio de la Sant√≠sima Trinidad Bol√≠var y Palacios, 1783 a mihca 7 a bulad 24 a demiad - 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad) u ngangan Si-mung.Pow-li-wa, La-tin-mey-cow tesek milaangay, tesekay mikawaway nu hitay, tesekay nu cen-ce, tesekay nu mizatengay, ciziza aci Sen-ma-tin masasuawaw tu, u Nan-mey-cow amiliyas tu pikuwan nu Si-pang-ya, angangan milunguc amisateked palekal. nilaculan i makay atu Si-pang-ya sakakaay mikeliday nu kanatal pilalebuay makademec hawsa, Pow-li-wa aci Sen-ma-tin mapulung miedap tu Nan-mey-cow a kasateked nu kanatal, patizeng tu La-tin-mey-cow u saayaway nu mitekeday a kakadum nu kanatal, u Taa-ke-lon-pi-ya, 1819 a mihcaan katukuh 1830 a muhcaan mala Cung-tung nuyniay a kanatal. nikauzipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ Si-mung.pow-li-wa lecuhiI Wi-ney-luy-la-cya-la-cya-s cacay u kakitaan a luma'. lecuh i ayzaay a Wi-ney-luy-la angangan nu cya-la-cya-s, ngasaw a ngangnan Pow-li-wa u makayzaay I Si-pang-ya Pa-s-ke a kakitizaan tu Si-aw-al-te-sa-OW-li-wa-al. I lima' niza, caay ku ahebal ku pipalumaan atu 1000 a katuud ku kuli dada', izaw hena ku kim a aalaan, waneng kusi, luma' zaysang atu pacakayan tu zyunga. zuma midebungay mahiza u sikulisiway, u labu nu luma' niza u mipenecay, u mamipenecay aca. u sasikezay nuheni a mialaw tu mikuliay a sakauzip. zumaay tu, u heni i cen-cean, kizayanan masakinih nu midebungay a Si-pang-ya, mipenec, siza, uyni sikalisiway sakalah amaydih pabelin tu mikuwanay nu midemungay, mihulak tu sacukcuk nu midebungay. ci Pow-li-wa cay katenes a lecuhan, caay kakapah ku uzip niza a wama ina ahicanaca papidiput han niza ku nu luma'ay akuli, tusa a mihcaan hawsa ci Pow-li-wa tayza tu i luma'a ni wama ina niza, uyzasa zikuz u ngelu' niza malalid malalid ku pihaceng. 1786 a mihca 1 a bulad, ci Pow-li-wa tusa izaw ku pangkiw a mihcaan hawsa, u wama ci Bo-an.Wi-sen-te.Pow-li-wa zayhan mahaykaku mapatay, 8 a mihcaan ku nikauzip hawsa "1792 a mihcaan" wina ci Tang-na.Ma-li-ya.Te-la-kungsay-pow-si-ong.Pa-la-si-aw-s.i .Pu-lan-ke mapatay, mapatay tu amin ku wama ina zikuz, ci Ka-low-s amasingan a luma' mueneng ciniza, nama hiza i 1799 a mihcaan tayza i Si-pang-ya minanam tu Ba a cudad, 1802 a mihca 5 a bulad 26 a demiad maladay ci Ma-li-ya.Ta-lye-ya.Low-te-li-kuy-ce.Te-al-tu-low.A-lay-sa i Si-pang-ya-Ma-te-li malaacawa, 7 a bulad 12 a demiad maladay tu acawa taluma' i niyazu' Wi-ney-luy-la, nika acawa ci Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa i 1803 a mihca 1 a bulad 22 a demiad malalid nu imelang mapatay.1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow ciniza, 12 a bulad 2 a demiad tayza i Pa-li milihiza tu pakawlah ni Na-pow-lun, mala mikiliday nu mikuwanay ni Na-pow-lun. mapatayś≠Ľšļ° , Si-mung.pow-li-wa i 1830 a mihca 12 a bulad 17 a demiad zayhan mahaykaku mapatay i Ke-lun-piya "ayzaay a Ke-lun-piya" a Sen-ma-al-ta.1842 a mihca 12 a bulad 23 a demiad, Pow-li-wa a ukak matadem i ngasawan a tadem. ci Pow-li-wa i ayaw a mapatay misalunguc ciniza tu sakatusa nu mikuwanay ci Tan-ni-al.Bow-low-lun-s.Aw-li tuduhen ku zikuc niza, pasu nisulitan, tigami atu sapapelu a nisulitan. teked a nikaauzipÁßĀšļļÁĒüśīĽ 1799 a mihcaan 16 ku mihcaan cni Pow-li-wa miladay tu kapah hena mapatay tu a wama ci Hu-an.Wi-sen-te "1786 a mihcaan mapatay" atu wina ci Kang-say.pu-si-ong "1792 a mihcaan", miliwku miccudad I Mo-si-ke, Ba-kow atu Si-pang-ya. 1802 a mihcaan, i Ma-te-li- tu makayniay i Cya-la-cya-s-Ma-al-ke-s.te-al.to-low luma'ay a Ma-li-ya.Te-lye-sa.Li-te-li-ke-s.Te-al.to-low.A-lay-ca malaacawaw, 8 a bulad zikuz mikilid tu luma'ay taluma' i Wi-ney-loy-la, caay ka lemed malalid tu akuti'ay a imelang mapatay. Pow-li-ya i 1804 a mihcaan taluma' i Aw-cow, i Na-pow-lun a hungtian a kanatal miliwku. i Ba-kow a demiadani Pa-li maazih niza ci Ya-li-san-ta. Bung.Hung-paw. Hung-paw na i1804 a mihcaan misulit tu, "na i Pali maazih ku cacay masakapahay a tatamia, masasukamu cinizaan hawsa mihaymaw sakay cinizaan tu paydang maydih manawang, nika nayinayi' ku kasibalucu'. laluma'an Ť¶™ŚĪ¨ . ci Pow-li-wa nayi' ku wawa, u wawanay mabenit atu sibuluuk, u laluma'an niza uyza kakana sabama dada' izaw ku cacay a sabana mapatay. Kakana ci Hu-an-na.Pow-li-wa.Pow-la-si-aw-s mikadabu tu sinaama ci Ti-aw-ni-si-aw.pa-la-si-aw-s.Pu-lan-ke, asaca tatusa ku nipahabay tu wawaci Ci-li-al-mu atu ci Pan-ni-ci-na. Ci-li-al-mu i 1817 a mihca 12 a bulad 2 demiad mapulung tu sinaama milais mapatay, Pan-ni-ci-na natusaay tu siacawa, Pow-li-wa a sangaayay a laluma'an, tatusaay a baki nuheni ci Pey-te-low-atciAy-te-hwa-tu, zikuz katukuh 2009 a mihcaan mauzip i Cyw-la-Cya-s.
